name: 我的一个多重人格朋友
slug: 我的一个多重人格朋友
developer: 上海久游网络科技有限公司
publisher: 上海久游网络科技有限公司
short_description: This is an AVG game that involves reasoning and decryption. He Zhou has 7 different personalities, which alternate seven days a week. Players will play as a detective and deduce the truth behind the horrifying cases surrounding He Zhou through the diary he left behind.
detailed_description:
This game is an AVG game that involves deduction and decryption. He Zhou has 7 different personalities, which alternate seven days a week. Players will play as a detective and deduce the truth behind the horrifying cases surrounding He Zhou through the diary he left behind.

Game background:

My name is He Zhou. My lifetime is one seventh that of others, but the thickness of my life is seven times that of others. Because there are seven 'me' living in this body. But don't misunderstand, we are not like those violent and unreasonable split personalities in movies. In order to better coexist, we named them Monday to Sunday respectively. In fact, we also follow a 7-day cycle and have our own independent lives. We have never met in person before, and the words on the sticky notes are the only way we communicate. Besides that, everyone has a diary to keep track of their little secrets. In short, I have seven selves, which gives me a richer life and a lonelier life. The excitement is mine, and the loneliness is also mine.

Game features:

Text and voice dubbing throughout the game

Immersive visual novel experience

Rich decryption content

Intricate case reasoning

Step by step, restore the truth of the event through diary entries and clues
